title: Image, area, button with image and object elements should include an alternative text
description:
The alt, aria-label and aria-labelledby attributes provide textual alternatives for images, areas, buttons, and objects. Alternative text is essential for accessibility and is used when:

- The image cannot be rendered or found
- Users rely on screen readers or assistive technologies
- Image loading is disabled to reduce data consumption
- Images are used as interactive elements

This rule detects:
- Missing alt attributes on img, area, and object elements
- Empty or whitespace-only alt text
- Redundant alt text patterns (e.g., 'image of...', 'picture of...')
- Generic or meaningless alt text (e.g., 'image', 'click here')
- createElement calls that don't set up accessibility attributes

For decorative images, use role='presentation' instead of empty alt text.
recommendation:
Add appropriate accessibility attributes:
- Use 'alt' attribute with descriptive text for informative images
- Use 'aria-label' for elements where alt is not available
- Use 'aria-labelledby' to reference other elements that describe this one
- Use role='presentation' for purely decorative images
- Avoid redundant phrases like 'image of' or 'picture of'
- Provide specific, meaningful descriptions that convey the image's purpose or content
impact: Accessibility barrier for screen reader users and other assistive technologies

noncompliant.description: Image element created without alt text setup
Empty alt text using direct assignment
Redundant alt text with 'image of' phrase
JSX image element without alt attribute
React createElement for image without accessibility attributes

compliant.code: const img = document.createElement('img'); img.alt = 'Golden retriever playing fetch in a park'; img.src = 'photo.jpg';
compliant.description: Image element with descriptive alt text

compliant.code: element.setAttribute('alt', 'Company logo with blue and white colors');

compliant.description: JSX image with descriptive alt text

compliant.code: React.createElement('img', {src: 'photo.jpg', alt: 'Team photo from annual meeting'})
compliant.description: React createElement with proper alt text

checks.message: Images, areas, buttons with images, and objects should include alternative text (alt, aria-label, or aria-labelledby).
Element created with properties object. Ensure accessibility attributes (alt, aria-label, or aria-labelledby) are included.
JSX element detected. Verify it includes accessibility attributes (alt, aria-label, or aria-labelledby).
Empty alt text detected. Provide descriptive alternative text or use role='presentation' for decorative images.
Empty alt text assigned. Provide descriptive alternative text or use role='presentation' for decorative images.
